creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue Nov 26 16:02:04  2024 UTC, j.suenram@it-ngo.com wrote:
> From what I have observed, if a frame with the specific MAC address
> (00:00:5e:00:01:cc:01) traverses the switch, it will be correctly learned by the
> switch. However, if such a frame does not pass through, the MAC address won't be
> populated in the switch's forwarding table.

But CARP master sends a frame every second with its specific MAC address.
